---
title: "Therapeutic Drug Monitoring Tools"
description: |
  Therapeutic Drug Monitoring (TDM) tools are web-based platforms that assist clinicians in optimizing precision dosing for improved patient outcomes.

output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    edit: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

**Note:** At present, these tools support high-dose methotrexate (HD-MTX), with further applications currently in development.

  
## High-Dose Methotrexate (HD-MTX)

[HD-MTX TDM tool](https://019ddfa9-9cb7-fc11-0955-cc8f94d87446.share.connect.posit.cloud/)
